summary: Re-tested all 7 PropOS UX cleanup tests after main agent fixes. 6/7 PASS (TEST1, TEST2, TEST4, TEST5, TEST6, TEST7). Only TEST3 fails — and the failure is purely a data-testid prefix mismatch on the accordion sections in InvestDashboard.jsx. Sections render visually (Strategy / Yield / Final Verdict are visible after clicking invest-toggle-full) but their testids are 'invest-acc-invest-section-strategy' (double-prefix) instead of the spec-required 'invest-section-strategy'. Opener -> Dashboard transition (the regression that blocked iter48) is now FIXED on both /invest/asset/demo and /operate. Confirmed by waiting on `[data-testid='invest-opener-continue-btn'][data-ready='true']` before clicking (the button is gated by a `phase==='ready'` animation; clicking before that no-ops because parent has pointer-events-none).

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid naming mismatch. Each AccordionSection is rendered as `<AccordionSection id='invest-section-strategy' testIdPrefix='invest-acc' ...>`. AccordionSection emits `data-testid={`${testIdPrefix}-${id}`}` which produces 'invest-acc-invest-section-strategy' (double 'invest-'). Spec requires plain 'invest-section-strategy' / 'invest-section-yield' / 'invest-section-final-verdict'. Two fixes possible: (a) change every `id='invest-section-X'` to `id='X'` (e.g. id='strategy') and set testIdPrefix='invest-section', or (b) leave id as-is and set testIdPrefix='' (or omit prefix and use id directly).

TEST1_homepage_proof_cards.notes: 3 cards with correct testids landing-proof-card-decision/-revenue-gap/-next-action and correct text ('Buy / Negotiate / Pass', 'Revenue Gap', 'Next Best Action').

TEST2_invest_minimal_default.notes: All 5 strip cards visible (strip-decision/-price-position/-market-support/-risk/-next-action). Accordion sections NOT in DOM (count=0) as required. invest-detail-toggles visible. Required wait pattern: wait for `[data-testid='invest-opener-continue-btn'][data-ready='true']` (button is gated by phase animation), click, then 2500ms wait, then query invest-decision-strip.

TEST3_toggle_full.notes: invest-full-analysis-header visible after click, invest-detail-toggles no longer visible (both correct). But invest-section-strategy/yield/final-verdict each have count=0 due to testid double-prefix bug (actual testids are invest-acc-invest-section-strategy etc). Visually the sections DO render correctly.

TEST4_strip_values.notes: All 5 strip values are real and match spec regex/enum: strip-decision='PASS', strip-price-position='Below Market', strip-market-support='Medium', strip-risk and strip-next-action are non-empty meaningful strings.

TEST5_operate_hero.notes: All 7 required testids present after demo-btn -> Continue Analysis -> 2500ms: operate-section-hero, operate-perf-adr/-occ/-rev/-yield, operate-opp-gap, operate-action-0, operate-build-plan-cta.

TEST6_spitogatos_unreadable.notes: URL paste navigates to /invest/asset/<id>, listing-unreadable-screen visible, all 4 paths (retry, paste, upload, manual) present.

TEST7_brand.notes: propos-nav contains 'PropOS.', propos-footer contains 'PropOS', title='PropOS — The Operating System for Hospitality Assets', no VELA/STAYOS in user-visible text.

action_items: Fix data-testid double-prefix in InvestDashboard.jsx accordion sections. Recommended: change AccordionSection invocations from `id='invest-section-strategy' testIdPrefix='invest-acc'` -> `id='strategy' testIdPrefix='invest-section'` (and same for yield, risks, comparables, renovation, due-diligence, exit, deal-score, snapshot, better-deals, final-verdict). This will produce the spec-required 'invest-section-strategy' etc. Verify all 11 sections after the fix.
critical_code_review_comments: InvestOpener button is gated by `phase === 'ready'` (parent div has pointer-events-none until then). With force=True a Playwright click registers but the browser hit-tests against the pointer-events-none parent and onContinue never fires. This previously masqueraded as the 'opener stuck' regression in iter48. Consider exposing a simpler ready signal (e.g. enable button purely via `disabled` attribute) so automated testing and a11y both behave predictably.
InvestDashboard.jsx is 622 lines — recommend splitting the AccordionSection block into its own module (e.g. InvestFullAnalysis.jsx) since each section is a duplicate shape.
Persistent console 401 from a background fetch on page load (carried over from iter48) — not blocking but worth a follow-up to remove or auth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com. CRITICAL WAIT PATTERN for /invest/asset/demo and /operate: the opener button exists in DOM almost immediately, but its parent div has `pointer-events-none` until a 'ready' animation phase completes (~5-7s). To click reliably wait for the explicit ready signal: `[data-testid='invest-opener-continue-btn'][data-ready='true']` (or the operate equivalent). Then click WITHOUT force=True, then wait 2500ms. The opener->dashboard transition itself works correctly. Only outstanding issue is the accordion-section testid double-prefix bug ('invest-acc-invest-section-strategy' vs 'invest-section-strategy'). After main agent fix, re-run TEST 3 only.
rca_of_the_issue: TEST3 RCA: In /app/frontend/src/pages/invest/InvestDashboard.jsx (lines ~344-450), each accordion is invoked as `<AccordionSection id='invest-section-strategy' testIdPrefix='invest-acc' ...>`. /app/frontend/src/components/invest/dashboard/AccordionSection.jsx line 40 builds `data-testid={`${testIdPrefix}-${id}`}` -> 'invest-acc-invest-section-strategy'. Spec selectors `[data-testid='invest-section-strategy']` return count=0. Fix: align id+prefix to produce the bare 'invest-section-<name>'. Reproduction: navigate to /invest/asset/demo, wait for invest-opener-continue-btn data-ready=true, click, wait 2500ms, click invest-toggle-full, inspect DOM — all accordion testids carry the spurious 'invest-acc-' prefix. The opener->dashboard regression from iter48 is fully resolved.
